visual_description: A man in dark clothing stands in a dimly lit corridor holding a pistol, while another man in a dark jacket appears behind him. The scene shifts to a brighter hallway where two men stand near a wall with Chinese characters, one pointing a finger. Later, three men are seen in a tiled room, with a man in a sequined jacket shaking hands with an older man in a suit while another man watches.
